text: Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers later. Force 3 to 4 east to southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts, becoming northerlies.
Temperature falling slightly. Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 2 to 4 north to northeasterly winds, becoming easterlies.
Mainly cloudy. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 east to southeasterly winds, occasionally force 5.
